description:
Attach a tests-platform blueprint to a CAT config (BP-MODES-1 §5).

The blueprint JSON is EMBEDDED verbatim at config-creation time (fetched
from tests-platform /api/v1/blueprints/{id} or pasted) — never referenced
live — so Ignite runs without a live tests-platform and configs are
self-describing for replay and simulation. Validated on save against the
vendored contract schema (app.contracts).

`on_nonconformant` is the scoring policy when a session completes with an
unsatisfiable minimum at max_items (spec §3.4(2)): 'flag' keeps the score
and marks the record; 'invalidate_score' additionally withholds the
scaled-score report.
title: BlueprintBinding
